heading: Extinguishment of claims
label: 539m–8 Extinguishment of claims
notes: References in TextSections 539m to 539m–12 of this title, referred to in subsec. (e), was in the original “this title”, meaning title IV of div. F of , , , which is classified generally to sections 539m to 539m–12 of this title. For complete classification of title IV to the Code, see Short Title note set out under and Tables.Pub. children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: Except for the rights and interests in and to the Area specifically recognized in sections 539m–2, 539m–3, 539m–5, 539m–6, and 539m–7 of this title, all Pueblo claims to right, title and interest of any kind, including aboriginal claims, in and to land within the Area, any part thereof, and property interests therein, as well as related boundary, survey, trespass, and monetary damage claims, are permanently extinguished. The United States’ title to the Area is confirmed.

children.heading: Subdivisions
children.label: b Subdivisions
children.text: Any Pueblo claims to right, title and interest of any kind, including aboriginal claims, in and to the subdivisions and property interests therein (except for land owned in fee by the Pueblo as of ), as well as related boundary, survey, trespass, and monetary damage claims, are permanently extinguished.February 20, 2003

children.heading: Special use and crest facilities areas
children.label: c Special use and crest facilities areas

children.text: the land described in the special use permit; and
the land on which the crest facilities are located.

children.heading: Pueblo agreement
children.label: d Pueblo agreement
children.text: As provided in the Settlement Agreement, the Pueblo has agreed to the relinquishment and extinguishment of those claims, rights, titles and interests extinguished pursuant to subsection (a), (b), and (c).1So in original. Probably should be “subsections”.1

children.heading: Consideration
children.label: e Consideration
children.text: The recognition of the Pueblo’s rights and interests in sections 539m to 539m–12 of this title constitutes adequate consideration for the Pueblo’s agreement to the extinguishment of the Pueblo’s claims in this section and the right-of-way grants contained in , and it is the intent of Congress that those rights and interests may only be diminished by a future Act of Congress specifically authorizing diminishment of such rights, with express reference to sections 539m to 539m–12 of this title.section 539m–7 of this title
